standards_passed: no-hardcoded-values — LIFECYCLE_FILE_DEFAULT and SCORES_FILE_DEFAULT use ${HOME}; LOCK_TIMEOUT uses env-var override pattern ${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}
use-source-venv — both python3 calls are guarded by 'source ~/.claude/venv/bin/activate &&'
meaningful-naming — score-inject.sh and lifecycle-baseline-import.sh are descriptive names
english-only — no Chinese characters in changed files; unconditional Standard 6 scan of agents/ and commands/ dirs returned zero matches
merge-similar-scripts — scripts serve distinct non-overlapping roles (read-path inject vs one-time migration); no merging warranted
parameterized-scripts — LOCK_TIMEOUT='${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}' accepts env-var override; file paths accept --lifecycle-file and --scores-file CLI args with defaults
dangling-references — no scripts/ references inside either file
merge-conflicts — no conflict markers found in either file
notes: Task MICRO goal (parameterize flock timeout literals) is fully implemented: both scripts declare LOCK_TIMEOUT='${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}' and use ${LOCK_TIMEOUT} in flock -w and stderr messages. No bare literal '10' remains in flock invocations.
Standard 6 unconditional scan covered agents/ and commands/ directories as required by spec exception; zero Chinese characters found.
